overall.description: A static cinematic view of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the futuristic skyline across the harbor during golden hour. The camera remains fixed, capturing towering neon-lit skyscrapers, industrial smokestacks, and docked boats along the waterfront with warm sunlight reflecting off the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic harbor waterfront with industrial docks

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the city skyline from across the harbor, taking in the panoramic view

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard with red neon lighting on the left side of the frame
dense collection of futuristic high-rise buildings with reflective glass facades and spires
tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke plumes on the right skyline
calm dark water surface in the foreground reflecting the city lights
weathered wooden piers and dock platforms extending into the water
small boats and watercraft tied up along the docks

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk city skyline across a harbor during golden hour. The scene features towering glass skyscrapers with neon accents, industrial smokestacks on the right, and wooden docks with moored boats in the foreground. The warm sunlight creates a cinematic atmosphere with reflections dancing on the calm water surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic panorama of a futuristic cyberpunk skyline that remains bathed in the warm glow of golden hour. It begins with a wide view of towering glass skyscrapers accented by neon lights, which loom over a calm harbor. As the eye moves across the horizon, the sleek architecture gives way to industrial smokestacks on the right, contrasting the high-tech city with gritty urban utility. The scene finally settles on the foreground, where wooden docks and moored boats sit amidst shimmering reflections dancing on the water's surface.
